title: Sanjeev Gupta
compiled_truth: Sanjeev Gupta is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-10-05 to 2002-05-13), Sanjeev Gupta sent 23 and received 136 emails, totalling 159 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kam Keiser](people/kam-keiser) (10), [S  Lim](people/s-lim) (10), [M  Love](people/m-love) (7), [Errol Mclaughlin](people/errol-mclaughlin) (6), [Karima Husain](people/karima-husain) (6). Mailbox folders observed: 08_saved, calendar, central, deleted_items, inbox.
